sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Rope Climbing
special_mechanics.description: Player can climb ropes in the game world

special_mechanics.name: Jump-Stun
special_mechanics.description: Player can briefly stun enemies by jumping on their heads

special_mechanics.name: Diskarmor Attack
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon is a razor-sharp spinning shield attached to a chain that operates like a yo-yo, can be thrown some distance while remaining tethered

special_mechanics.name: Ducking
special_mechanics.description: Player can duck down to perform alternative attacks or dodge

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game features classic NES platformer mechanics with rope climbing and jump-based combat. Known for high difficulty. European version has reduced stat caps (1023 max vs 4095 in other versions) due to programming error.
